label: Transfer History
description: Recent transfer history with status, transaction references, amounts, and venue routing details.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx wraps all widgets globally.

0.7.note: emptyMessage="No transfers yet" passed to TableWidget.

0.9.note: No dead code. No fixes required.

l0.notes: 0.1 WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx wraps all widgets globally. 0.2 requiredEntitlements=["execution-basic","execution-full"]. 0.3 availableOn=["accounts"]. 0.4 No any/ts-ignore. 0.5 No lib/mocks imports. 0.6 isLoading passed to TableWidget. 0.7 emptyMessage="No transfers yet" passed to TableWidget. 0.8 error+onRetry wired to TableWidget. 0.9 No dead code. No fixes required.

1.1.note: Data from useAccountsData() → transferHistory (no inline fetch).

1.2.note: Context calls useGlobalScope() and filters balances by org venue membership.

1.3.note: Org filter changes balances via orgVenues memo.

1.4.note: Client filter: N/A — transfer history is user-scoped via auth token (queryKey includes user.id); client sub-filter not applicable to this widget's domain function.

1.5.note: Strategy filter: N/A — transfers are account-level, not strategy-scoped.

1.6.note: Empty scope → orgVenues=null → no venue filtering applied, all balances returned.

1.7.note: SAFTRecord type re-exported from lib/mocks/fixtures/trading-pages.ts via context; this is a context-level concern, not a widget-level one. Widget imports only from context.

l1.notes: 1.1 Data from useAccountsData() → transferHistory (no inline fetch). 1.2 Context calls useGlobalScope() and filters balances by org venue membership. 1.3 Org filter changes balances via orgVenues memo. 1.4 Client filter: N/A — transfer history is user-scoped via auth token (queryKey includes user.id); client sub-filter not applicable to this widget's domain function. 1.5 Strategy filter: N/A — transfers are account-level, not strategy-scoped. 1.6 Empty scope → orgVenues=null → no venue filtering applied, all balances returned. 1.7 SAFTRecord type re-exported from lib/mocks/fixtures/trading-pages.ts via context; this is a context-level concern, not a widget-level one. Widget imports only from context.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

knownIssues: L1 context issue (not widget): accounts-data-context.tsx re-exports SAFTRecord type from lib/mocks/fixtures/trading-pages.ts and inlines MOCK_SAFTS directly. saftRecords data is never fetched — it is hardcoded mock data. Context-level fix deferred (out of scope for widget certification).
findings: L1.4/1.5: Transfer history is scoped by auth user (queryKey=["transfer-history", user.id]). Client and strategy sub-filtering is not applicable — transfers are atomic account operations, not strategy positions.
All L0 checks passed without any code changes required.
